subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him, and He Who speaketh is verily the Dawning-Place of His signs and the Dayspring of His evidences [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و الذی ینطق انه لمشرق آیاته و مطلع بیناته الذی
